query:
-- Priority breakdown of enrichment status
SELECT 
  priority,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'not_found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as notFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasEmail
FROM contacts
GROUP BY priority;

-- How many contacts were enriched in last 7 days
SELECT 
  DATE(enrichedAt) as day,
  COUNT(*) as enrichedCount,
  enrichmentSource
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(enrichedAt), enrichmentSource
ORDER BY day DESC;
